channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.23 (Build 20260607)
item.description:
What's New

feat(sync): sync window title rule order across devices via sortIndex

Drag-to-reorder of custom window title rules now converges cross-device.

Order was previously local array position with no synced timestamp, so it

never propagated. Encode cascade order in a new synced sortIndex field on

WindowTitleRule; reorder bumps each entry's content signature and timestamp,

so it propagates by the same per-entry last-write-wins merge as any edit.

  • WindowTitleRule: add sortIndex (backward-compatible decode + migration)
  • loadCustomRules sorts by (sortIndex, id); updateCustomRule preserves the

existing index so edits/toggles don't reorder; addCustomRule appends last

  • Update two-device test: reorder now converges (newer write wins)

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
